settings.security.title: Security
settings.security.description: Manage two-factor authentication and account security
settings.security.mfaNotAvailableDesc: Multi-factor authentication is not enabled on this system. Contact your administrator if you need this feature.
settings.security.mfaEnabledDesc: Your account is protected with two-factor authentication using an authenticator app.
settings.security.mfaDisabledDesc: Add an extra layer of security to your account by enabling two-factor authentication.
settings.security.mfaNotNeeded: MFA is handled by your identity provider (PKI/Keycloak). No additional setup needed.
settings.security.setupInstructions: Scan the QR code below with your authenticator app (Google Authenticator, Authy, Microsoft Authenticator, etc.)
settings.security.secretKey: Secret Key (enter manually in your app)
settings.security.enterCode: Enter the 6-digit code from your app
settings.security.backupCodesWarning: These codes can be used if you lose access to your authenticator app. Each code can only be used once. Store them in a safe place.
settings.security.disableWarning: Enter a code from your authenticator app or a backup code to disable MFA. This will make your account less secure.
settings.security.disableFailed: Failed to disable MFA. Please check your code.
settings.recording.title: Recording Settings
settings.recording.autoStopHelp: Automatically stop recording when limit is reached
settings.audioExtraction.title: Audio Extraction
settings.audioExtraction.description: Control how large video files are handled during upload. When enabled, audio is extracted from videos before uploading, reducing file size by 90%+ without affecting transcription quality.
settings.audioExtraction.enableExtractio: When uploading large video files, extract just the audio track to speed up uploads and save storage
settings.audioExtraction.thresholdHint: Videos larger than this size will trigger audio extraction
settings.audioExtraction.thresholdInfo: Videos larger than {{size}}MB will be flagged for audio extraction during upload
settings.audioExtraction.showDialogDesc: Show a confirmation dialog before extracting audio (disable to extract automatically for qualifying files)
settings.audioExtraction.rememberChoiceD: Apply the same decision (extract or upload full video) for future uploads
settings.audioExtraction.saveFailed: Failed to save audio extraction settings
settings.audioExtraction.loadFailed: Failed to load audio extraction settings. Using defaults.
settings.audioExtraction.howItWorks1: When you upload a video file above the threshold, extraction is offered
settings.audioExtraction.howItWorks2: Audio is extracted in your browser before uploading (nothing leaves your device until complete)
settings.audioExtraction.howItWorks3: Only the audio track is uploaded, reducing file size by 90%+
settings.audioExtraction.howItWorks4: Example: a 500 MB video becomes ~45 MB of audio
settings.audioExtraction.howItWorks5: Output format: Opus at 32 kbps, 16 kHz mono (optimized for speech recognition)
settings.transcription.title: Transcription Settings
settings.transcription.description: Configure transcription quality, speaker diarization, and garbage segment cleanup preferences.
settings.transcription.speakerDetectionD: Configure speaker diarization behavior for transcriptions.
settings.transcription.speakerDetectionT: Configure how many speakers the diarization model should detect. PyAnnote uses clustering with no hard upper limit - values up to 50+ are supported for large events.
settings.transcription.disableDiarizatio: Skip speaker separation. Use for voicemails, dictations, or single-speaker recordings.
Speaker profiles and cross-file speaker matching will not run.
settings.transcription.speakerDetectionD: Speaker detection disabled — all segments will be assigned to a single speaker.
settings.transcription.behaviorTooltipAl: Show speaker settings dialog on every upload or reprocess.
settings.transcription.behaviorTooltipUs: Skip the dialog and automatically use system-wide defaults
Skip the dialog and use your custom min/max values saved below.
settings.transcription.garbageCleanupDes: Replace long noise artifacts with [background noise].
settings.transcription.garbageCleanupToo: WhisperX can sometimes misinterpret background noise (fans, static, rumbling) as extremely long "words" with no spaces. This feature detects and replaces these artifacts with [background noise].
settings.transcription.languageSettingsD: Configure language preferences for transcription and AI analysis.
settings.transcription.languageSettingsT: Configure language options for transcription and AI summaries. Source language helps improve transcription accuracy. Translation converts foreign audio to English text.
settings.transcription.sourceLanguageToo: Let Whisper automatically identify the spoken language.
Provide a hint to improve accuracy when you know the audio language.
Languages with word-level timestamps are marked with a checkmark.
settings.transcription.translateToEnglis: When enabled, foreign language audio will be transcribed and translated to English. When disabled, the transcription stays in the original language.
settings.transcription.aiSummaryLanguage: Choose the language for AI-generated summaries, action items, and analysis. This setting is independent of the transcription language - you can transcribe in Spanish but get summaries in English, or vice versa.
Language used for AI summaries and analysis
settings.transcription.defaultsValue: Source: Auto-detect, Translate: Off, Summary: English
settings.transcription.validationMinMax: Minimum speakers cannot be greater than maximum speakers
settings.transcription.validationMinRang: Minimum speakers must be between 1 and 50
settings.transcription.validationMaxRang: Maximum speakers must be between 1 and 50
settings.transcription.validationThresho: Garbage cleanup threshold must be between 20 and 200
settings.transcription.validationVadThre: VAD threshold must be between 0.1 and 0.95
settings.transcription.validationVadSile: Minimum silence duration must be between 100 and 5000 ms
settings.transcription.validationVadSpee: Minimum speech duration must be between 50 and 5000 ms
settings.transcription.validationVadPad: Speech padding must be between 0 and 2000 ms
settings.transcription.validationHalluci: Hallucination threshold must be between 0.5 and 10 seconds
settings.transcription.validationRepetit: Repetition penalty must be between 1.0 and 2.0
settings.transcription.advancedSettingsD: Fine-tune voice detection and transcription accuracy. Default values work well for most audio.
settings.transcription.advancedSettingsT: These settings control how the AI detects speech in your audio and handles edge cases like silence, short utterances, and repetitive output. Only change these if you're experiencing specific issues with transcription quality.
settings.transcription.vadDesc: Controls how speech is detected and segmented in your audio. Silero VAD runs before transcription to identify speech regions.
settings.transcription.vadThresholdToolt: Controls how confident the model must be that audio contains speech. Lower values detect more speech (including quiet or unclear speech) but may include background noise. Higher values are stricter and may miss soft-spoken content.
settings.transcription.vadThresholdHint: Recommended: 0.30-0.50. Lower = more sensitive (may pick up noise). Higher = stricter (may miss quiet speech).
settings.transcription.vadMinSilenceTool: The minimum duration of silence (in milliseconds) required to split speech into separate segments. Shorter values create more, smaller segments. Longer values keep speech together even with brief pauses.
settings.transcription.vadMinSilenceHint: Recommended: 1500-2500ms. Lower = more segments (split on brief pauses). Higher = fewer segments (keeps speech together).
settings.transcription.vadMinSpeechToolt: Speech segments shorter than this duration (in milliseconds) are discarded. Increase to filter out brief clicks, coughs, or mic bumps. Decrease to keep short utterances like 'yes' or 'no'.
settings.transcription.vadMinSpeechHint: Recommended: 200-500ms. Lower = keep brief utterances. Higher = filter out short sounds.
settings.transcription.vadSpeechPadToolt: Extra padding (in milliseconds) added before and after each detected speech segment. Increase if words are being cut off at the beginning or end of sentences. Decrease for tighter segmentation.
settings.transcription.vadSpeechPadHint: Recommended: 200-500ms. Higher = fewer cut-off words. Lower = tighter segments.
settings.transcription.accuracyDesc: Settings to reduce transcription errors like hallucinated text and repeated phrases.
settings.transcription.hallucinationFilt: Whisper can sometimes generate phantom text during silent sections of audio. This filter detects silence gaps and skips any text the model produces during those gaps. Enable this if you see invented words or phrases during quiet sections.
settings.transcription.hallucinationHint: Enable if you see phantom text during silence. Recommended: 2-3 seconds when enabled. Higher = only filters longer silence gaps.
settings.transcription.repetitionPenalty: Penalizes the model for repeating the same words or phrases. At 1.0, no penalty is applied. Increase to 1.1-1.3 if you see the same phrase repeated multiple times. Values above 1.5 may reduce transcription fluency.
1.0 = off (default). 1.1-1.3 = recommended if seeing repetition. Above 1.5 may hurt quality.
settings.transcription.loadFailed: Failed to load transcription settings. Using defaults.
settings.download.title: URL Import Quality
settings.download.description: Configure default video and audio quality when importing media from URLs (YouTube, TikTok, and 1800+ platforms).
settings.download.videoQualityHint: If selected quality isn't available, the next best option will be used.
settings.download.videoQualityDisabledHi: Video quality is disabled when audio-only mode is active.
settings.download.audioOnlyHint: Download only audio (ideal for podcasts and music).
settings.download.audioQualityHint: Higher bitrate means better quality but larger files.
settings.download.loadFailed: Failed to load download settings. Using defaults.
settings.mediaSources.title: Media Sources
settings.mediaSources.description: Configure authenticated media servers for URL imports. Credentials are encrypted and used automatically when importing from these hosts.
settings.mediaSources.noSourcesHint: Add a media source to enable authenticated downloads from protected servers. Share them with your team so they can use them too.
settings.mediaSources.label: Display Name
settings.mediaSources.hint: Hosts configured here will be recognized when you paste URLs in the upload dialog. If credentials are stored, they are used automatically. Share sources with your team so they can import from the same servers.
settings.mediaSources.shareEnabled: Media source shared with all users
settings.garbageCleanup.title: Garbage Word Cleanup
settings.garbageCleanup.desc: Replace long noise artifacts with [background noise].
settings.garbageCleanup.tooltip: WhisperX can sometimes misinterpret background noise (fans, static, rumbling) as extremely long "words" with no spaces. This feature detects and replaces these artifacts.
settings.garbageCleanup.saveFailed: Failed to save garbage cleanup configuration
settings.garbageCleanup.loadFailed: Failed to load garbage cleanup configuration
settings.retry.title: Failed Task Retries
settings.retry.desc: Automatically retry failed transcriptions before marking as failed.
settings.retry.tooltip: When a transcription fails due to temporary issues (GPU memory, network), the system can automatically retry. Limiting retries prevents infinite loops for permanently failing tasks.
settings.retention.title: File Retention
settings.retention.warningBanner: Disabled by default. Enabling this will permanently delete files.
settings.retention.retentionDaysHint: Files completed more than this many days ago will be permanently deleted.
settings.retention.runTimeHint: Daily cleanup runs at this time in the configured timezone.
settings.retention.timezoneHint: Select the timezone for the scheduled run time.
settings.retention.deleteErrorFiles: Also delete files with processing errors
settings.retention.deleteErrorFilesHint: By default only completed files are deleted. Enable to also remove error files.
settings.retention.speakerProfilesNote: Speaker profiles and voice fingerprints are preserved and reused for future transcriptions.
settings.retention.previewEmpty: No files match the current retention criteria.
settings.retention.previewNote: This is a preview only — no files have been deleted.
settings.retention.runNowConfirmBody: Files older than {{days}} days will be permanently deleted.
settings.retention.confirmEnableBody: Files older than {{days}} days will be permanently deleted on a daily schedule. This cannot be undone.
settings.retention.confirmEnableCheckbox: I understand this will permanently delete files

settings.llmProvider.title: LLM Provider Configuration
settings.llmProvider.description: Configure your preferred Large Language Model provider for AI summarization and speaker identification.
settings.orgContext.title: Organization Context
settings.orgContext.description: Provide background context about your organization or project to improve AI-generated summaries.
settings.orgContext.label: Context Text
settings.orgContext.labelHint: Describe your organization, project, or domain so the AI can produce more relevant summaries.
settings.orgContext.placeholder: Example: Apex Quant Capital is an algorithmic trading firm specializing in high-frequency equity and derivatives strategies. Key personnel include James Wei (CIO), Maya Patel (Head of Research). We focus on alpha generation, risk-adjusted returns, and execution optimization. Common acronyms: HFT, PnL, VaR, AUM, FIX, VWAP, OMS.
settings.orgContext.includeDefaultDesc: Inject this context when using built-in system summary prompts.
settings.orgContext.includeCustomDesc: Inject this context when using your own custom summary prompts.
settings.orgContext.howItWorks1: The context you enter here is injected into the system prompt when the AI generates summaries for your transcripts.
settings.orgContext.howItWorks2: Include organization names, project names, key personnel, domain-specific acronyms, and any other background the AI should know.
settings.orgContext.howItWorks3: Toggle whether context is included with system prompts, custom prompts, or both.
settings.orgContext.howItWorks4: This context is per-user and does not affect other users' summaries.
settings.orgContext.shareDescription: Make this context available for other users to adopt.
settings.orgContext.shareEnabled: Organization context shared with all users
settings.orgContext.stoppedUsingShared: Switched back to your own organization context
settings.searchIndexing.title: Search & Indexing
settings.searchIndexing.description: Configure the embedding model and manage search indexing for semantic transcript search.
settings.search.indexHealthDesc: Status of OpenSearch indices. Red indices may need repair.
settings.search.repairConfirm: This will rebuild corrupted OpenSearch indices from the database. Continue?
settings.embeddingMigration.title: Speaker Embedding System
settings.embeddingMigration.description: Manage the speaker identification embedding system. Upgrade from v3 (pyannote/embedding, 512-dim) to v4 (WeSpeaker, 256-dim) for 4x better speaker matching accuracy.
settings.embeddingMigration.migrationNot: Transcription will be paused during migration so the GPU can focus on re-extracting embeddings. Queued uploads will resume automatically when migration completes.
settings.embeddingMigration.migrationEst: Estimated time: ~{{minutes}} minutes for {{count}} files (3 parallel GPU models, 16 I/O threads)
settings.embeddingMigration.transcriptio: Transcription is paused while migration is in progress. New uploads are queued and will process automatically when complete.
settings.embeddingMigration.v4ModeActive: Your system is using the latest speaker embedding technology.
settings.embeddingMigration.finalizeProm: V4 embeddings are ready. Click to finalize the migration and swap indices.

notifications.title: Notifications
about.title: About OpenTranscribe
about.subtitle: AI-Powered Transcription & Media Management Platform
about.description: OpenTranscribe transforms your audio and video files into accurate, searchable transcripts using cutting-edge AI models. Built for professional workflows with an intuitive user experience.
about.aiTranscriptionDesc: WhisperX for highly accurate speech-to-text with word-level timestamps.
about.speakerDetectionDesc: PyAnnote automatically identifies different speakers in conversations.
about.fullTextSearchDesc: OpenSearch integration enables powerful searching across all transcripts.
about.llmSummariesDesc: Generate intelligent summaries and extract action items with AI.
about.progressiveWebAppDesc: Works seamlessly across desktop and mobile devices.
about.securePrivateDesc: Self-hosted with role-based access control and JWT authentication.
about.stepUploadDesc: Upload audio/video files or record directly in the browser.
about.stepProcessDesc: AI models transcribe speech and identify speakers automatically.
about.stepEnhanceDesc: Generate summaries, extract action items with LLM features.
about.stepExploreDesc: Search, filter, and manage transcripts with powerful tools.
about.builtWithIntro: OpenTranscribe is powered by these amazing open-source technologies:
about.gratefulMessage: We're grateful to the open-source community for making OpenTranscribe possible.
about.whisperFoundation: provides the foundation for our transcription capabilities, and
about.pyannoteFoundation: powers our speaker diarization and voice fingerprinting.
autoLabel.title: Auto-Label Settings
autoLabel.description: Automatically apply high-confidence AI-generated tags and collections after transcription
autoLabel.enableHelp: Automatically apply AI-suggested tags and collections with confidence above the threshold
autoLabel.thresholdHelp: Only suggestions above this confidence level will be auto-applied
autoLabel.tagsHelp: Automatically create and apply AI-suggested tags to files
autoLabel.collectionsHelp: Automatically create collections and add files based on AI suggestions
autoLabel.bulkGroupingHelp: When uploading multiple files, automatically group them by shared topics into collections
autoLabel.retroactiveHelp: Run auto-labeling on all previously processed files that have pending AI suggestions

uploader.supportedPlatformsList: YouTube (recommended), Dailymotion, Twitter/X, Vimeo (public only), and 1800+ more sites via yt-dlp
uploader.platformAuthRequired: This video requires authentication and cannot be downloaded
uploader.platformLimitations: Authentication is not currently supported for most platforms. Password-protected corporate video portals may require additional credentials.
uploader.urlDisclaimerShort: Users are responsible for compliance with platform terms of service. Anti-bot detection measures may limit bulk downloads.
uploader.urlDisclaimerFull: OpenTranscribe is not responsible for bulk downloading of content from YouTube or other platforms. By using this feature, you accept all associated risks and agree to use it in accordance with applicable terms of service. Note that platforms employ anti-bot detection measures which may limit or block automated downloads.

settings.asrProvider.title: ASR Provider
settings.asrProvider.description: Configure external cloud speech-to-text providers as an alternative to the built-in local Whisper model. Cloud ASR can offer faster processing or support for additional languages.
settings.asrProvider.pricingDisclaimer: Prices are estimates. Check provider's website for current rates.
settings.asrProvider.fields.name: Configuration Name
settings.customVocabulary.title: Custom Vocabulary
settings.customVocabulary.description: Domain-specific terms to boost ASR accuracy across all providers (cloud and local)
settings.customVocabulary.localNote: Also applied as hotwords to local faster-whisper transcription
settings.asrProvider.deleteAllConfirmMes: Remove all cloud ASR configurations? The system will fall back to local GPU transcription.
settings.asrProvider.deletedAll: All ASR configurations deleted. Now using local GPU transcription.
settings.asrProvider.emptyDescription: No ASR configurations. Click 'Add Provider' to configure a cloud ASR provider, or use the default local GPU transcription.

Enter one term per line, e.g.:
Project Alpha
Atelectasis
Habeas Corpus
settings.embeddingMigration.stalledMigra: Migration stalled — {{count}} files could not be processed
settings.embeddingMigration.forceComplet: This will mark the migration as complete, skipping {{count}} unprocessed files. Speaker matching may not work for these files. Continue?
Migration marked as complete. Skipped files will not have v4 embeddings.
settings.embeddingMigration.forceReextra: Clears all v4 embeddings and re-extracts from scratch using improved segment merging
This will delete all {{count}} existing v4 embeddings and re-extract them from audio using the latest processing logic. This may take a while. Continue?
Force re-extraction started. All embeddings will be re-processed.
settings.speakerAttributes.bulkDescripti: Run speaker attribute detection on existing files that have not been processed yet.

settings.speakerAttributes.forceReproces: Re-runs gender detection on all files using the latest processing logic
This will re-analyze speaker attributes for all {{count}} files. Previously detected attributes will be overwritten. Continue?
Force reprocessing started. All files will be re-analyzed.
settings.dataIntegrity.title: Data Integrity
settings.dataIntegrity.description: Scan OpenSearch indices for orphaned documents (references to deleted files) and clean them up. Runs automatically every 6 hours.
settings.dataIntegrity.loadFailed: Failed to load data integrity status
settings.dataIntegrity.actionDescription: Scans all search indices for documents referencing files that no longer exist and removes them.
settings.embeddingConsistency.title: Embedding Consistency
settings.embeddingConsistency.descriptio: Detects speakers in the database that are missing from the OpenSearch speaker index and re-extracts their embeddings. Runs automatically every 10 minutes.
settings.embeddingConsistency.loadFailed: Failed to load embedding consistency status
settings.embeddingConsistency.actionDesc: Check for speakers missing from the search index and re-extract their voice embeddings from the original audio.
settings.embeddingConsistency.alreadyRun: Embedding consistency repair is already running
settings.embeddingConsistency.unrepairab: {{count}} speakers have segments too short for embedding extraction
settings.session.introText: Configure session and token lifetimes to balance security with user convenience. Shorter durations improve security but may require more frequent re-authentication.
settings.session.accessTokenHelp: Short-lived tokens used for API authentication. Recommended: 15-30 minutes.
settings.session.refreshTokenHelp: Used to obtain new access tokens without re-authentication. Recommended: 7-30 days.
settings.session.tokenInfo1: Access tokens are short-lived and automatically refreshed in the background
settings.session.tokenInfo2: Users stay logged in as long as refresh token is valid and they remain active
settings.session.tokenInfo3: Refresh tokens rotate on each use for enhanced security
settings.session.idleTimeoutHelp: Session expires after this period of inactivity. Set to 0 to disable.
settings.session.absoluteTimeoutHelp: Maximum session duration regardless of activity. Forces re-authentication.
settings.session.maxConcurrentSessionsHe: Maximum number of simultaneous sessions per user. Set to 0 for unlimited.
settings.session.policyOldestDesc: When limit reached, oldest session is terminated
settings.session.policyNewestDesc: When limit reached, new login attempts are denied
settings.session.policyAllDesc: New login terminates all existing sessions
settings.localAuth.selfRegistrationHelp: When disabled, only admins can create new accounts
settings.localAuth.totpHelp: Allow users to set up authenticator apps (Google Authenticator, Authy, etc.)
settings.localAuth.requireMfaHelp: When enabled, users must set up MFA on next login
loginBanner.consentText: By clicking "I Acknowledge", you consent to the terms above and confirm that you are authorized to access this system.
settings.accountStatus.loadError: Failed to load account status report
settings.accountStatus.comingSoonDesc: This feature is coming soon. The backend endpoints for account status reporting are not yet implemented.
settings.accountStatus.comingSoonNote: User management is available in the Users section. Account status reporting will provide aggregated statistics about user accounts.
settings.accountStatus.sectionDescriptio: Overview of user accounts, MFA adoption, and security status.
settings.auditLog.sectionDescription: View and export authentication and configuration change logs.
settings.auditLog.comingSoonDesc: This feature is coming soon. The backend endpoints for audit log querying are not yet implemented.
settings.auditLog.comingSoonNote: Authentication events are being logged to the database and OpenSearch. The admin UI for viewing and exporting logs is pending backend API implementation.
settings.authentication.heading: Authentication Configuration
settings.authentication.comingSoonDesc: This feature is coming soon. For now, configure authentication via environment variables:
settings.authentication.comingSoonNote: The backend security fixes (FIPS 140-3, audit logging, session controls) are active. Only the UI configuration is pending.
settings.ldap.serverHelp: Hostname or IP address of the LDAP server
settings.ldap.bindDnHelp: Distinguished Name for LDAP bind operations
settings.ldap.bindPasswordHelp: Password for the bind DN (stored securely)
settings.ldap.userSearchFilterHelp: LDAP filter to find users. Use {username} as placeholder. Examples: (uid={username}) for OpenLDAP/LLDAP, (sAMAccountName={username}) for Active Directory
settings.ldap.adminGroupsHelp: Comma-separated list of group DNs that grant admin access
settings.ldap.adminUsersHelp: Comma-separated list of usernames that are always admins
settings.ldap.allowedUserGroupsHelp: Leave empty to allow all authenticated users, or specify groups for access control
settings.keycloak.oidcDescription: This integration supports Keycloak and other OIDC-compliant identity providers including Azure AD, Okta, Auth0, and Google Workspace.
settings.keycloak.serverUrlPublicHelp: Public URL of the Keycloak/OIDC server (used by browser)
settings.keycloak.serverUrlInternalHelp: Internal URL for server-to-server communication (leave empty to use public URL)
settings.keycloak.realmHelp: Keycloak realm name (or tenant ID for Azure AD)
settings.keycloak.clientSecretHelp: Leave empty for public clients using PKCE
settings.keycloak.callbackUrlHelp: Must be registered in your OIDC provider's client configuration
settings.keycloak.usePkce: Use PKCE (Proof Key for Code Exchange)
settings.keycloak.usePkceHelp: Recommended for enhanced security. Required for public clients.
settings.keycloak.expectedAudiencePlaceh: Leave empty to use client ID
settings.keycloak.adminRoleHelp: Users with this role in their token will be granted admin privileges
settings.pki.advancedConfigurationDesc: PKI authentication requires proper infrastructure setup including certificate management, reverse proxy configuration, and CA certificate distribution. See the documentation for detailed setup instructions.
settings.pki.modeHeaderDesc: Certificate passed via HTTP headers from reverse proxy
settings.pki.modeMutualTlsDesc: Direct certificate verification via TLS handshake
settings.pki.caCertPathHelp: Path to the trusted CA certificate file (PEM format). Can be a CA bundle.
settings.pki.certHeaderHelp: HTTP header containing the client certificate
settings.pki.dnHeaderHelp: HTTP header containing the certificate DN
settings.pki.trustedProxiesHelp: Comma-separated list of trusted proxy IP ranges (CIDR notation)
settings.pki.softFailHelp: When enabled, authentication proceeds if OCSP/CRL servers are unreachable
settings.pki.adminDnsHelp: One DN per line. Users with matching certificate DNs will be granted admin privileges.
settings.pki.allowPasswordFallbackHelp: When enabled, users without certificates can authenticate using username/password
settings.llm.autoSummaryDesc: Automatically generate AI summaries after each transcription completes
settings.llm.autoSummaryDisabledHint: Summaries will not be generated automatically. You can still generate them manually per file.
settings.llm.systemSummaryDesc: Enable or disable AI summary generation for all users (admin only)
settings.llm.systemSummaryDisabledHint: AI summaries have been disabled by the administrator.
settings.llm.systemSummaryDisabledWarnin: AI summaries are disabled for ALL users. Manual generation is also blocked for non-admin users.
upload.skipSummary: Skip AI summary for this upload
upload.skipSummaryHint: Transcription will complete without generating an AI summary
summary.systemDisabled: AI summaries have been disabled by the administrator
summary.adminEnableHint: Contact your administrator to enable AI summary generation
uploader.whisperModelHint: Choose a Whisper model for this transcription
uploader.turboNoTranslation: Note: This model does not support translation. Translation will be disabled for this file.
gallery.diarizationDisabledTooltip: Speaker diarization was disabled for this file
reprocess.diarizationWasDisabled: This file was processed without speaker diarization. Select "Rediarize" to enable speaker detection.
